title: Skip Record
description: A policy that skips processing of a record.

type.description: The type name of the policy.

name.description: A unique user-defined name of the policy.

description.description: A human-readable description of the policy.

condition.description:
A string containing the boolean expression that determines whether the policy is applied.

When the policy is applied as a child policy of schema_validation, the expression can also reference
`record.value` fields.

fields.name: context.auth.principal.name
fields.description: Name of authenticated principal. Username in case of PLAIN/SCRAM, `sub` claim in case of OAUTHBEARER.

fields.name: context.auth.type
fields.description: The matched authentication type from a virtual cluster: anonymous, sasl_plain, sasl_scram_sha256, sasl_scram_sha512, sasl_oauth_bearer.

fields.name: record.headers
fields.description: An associative array of header key value pairs.

fields.name: record.value.validated
fields.description: Indicates whether the record value was successfully validated.

fields.name: record.value.content
fields.description: The content of the record value.

parent_policy_id.description: The unique identifier of the parent schema validation policy, if any.
